question: Which East Region vehicles are statistical outliers by distance, idle time, or trip count this week?
reasoning: Thompson (Truck 24) tops the East Region at 843 km total with 34 trips — driven by the Fremont–Dublin–Pleasanton corridor. Gonzalez (Van 23) is the efficiency leader at 8.6% idle across 31 trips. Andersen (Truck 26) is the region's most severe idle outlier at 33.8% — nearly 2× the region average of 17.5% — consistently accumulating dwell time at Fremont Warehouse and Livermore Park. Ibrahim runs a steady urban pattern at 10.1% idle. Murphy's lower numbers (14 trips, 334 km) reflect a lighter route assignment in the Livermore corridor; consider load-balancing with Thompson.
